Name: AFK
Description: You cannot perform actions for the next 3 rounds. Afterwards, gain 20 gold.

Name: Augmented Power
Description: Your next augment is one tier higher.

Name: Backup Bows
Description: Gain a Recurve Bow. After your team attacks 1000 times, gain 2 more. Attacks:

Name: Band of Thieves
Description: Gain 1 Thief's Gloves.

Name: Best Friends I
Description: Allies isolated in pairs gain 10% Attack Speed and 13 Armor at the start of combat.

Name: Bonk!
Description: Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes an Attack Fighter with a single target Ability that gets stronger with each kill.

Name: Boxing Lessons
Description: Your team gains 30 Health for each ally that starts combat in the front row.

Name: Branching Out
Description: Gain a random Emblem.

Name: Branching Out+
Description: Gain a random Emblem and a Reforger.

Name: Caretaker's Ally
Description: Gain a random 2-cost champion now. Gain the same one again every time you level up.

Name: Carve a Path
Description: Gain a B.F. Sword. After your team deals 65000 physical damage, gain 2 more.

Name: Charge Transfer I
Description: Your team gains 5% Damage Amp. 50% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

Name: Climb The Ladder I
Description: Each time an ally dies, allies that share at least one trait with them gain 3% Ability Power, 3% Attack Damage, 3 Armor, and 3 Magic Resist.

Name: Cognitive Tax
Description: Gain 8 gold and 1 XP.

Name: Cognitive Tax+
Description: Gain 12 gold and 3 XP.

Name: Continuous Conjuration
Description: Gain a Needlessly Large Rod. After your team deals 38000 magic damage, gain 2 more.

Name: Corrosion
Description: Enemy champions in the first two rows lose 4 Armor and Magic Resist every 2 seconds.

Name: Crafted Crafting
Description: Whenever you craft a completed item, gain 2 rerolls.

Name: Critical Success
Description: Gain a Sparring Glove. After your team's attacks critically strike 320 times, gain 2 more.

Name: Dummify
Description: Lose all champions on your board and bench. Gain a Training Dummy with 60% of their combined Health. The Training Dummy gains 1000 Health per stage. Gain a non-Tank 2-star 2-cost champion.

Name: Electrocharge I
Description: Every 4 attacks an ally takes, they deal 30-90 (based on current Stage) magic damage to nearby enemies (1 second cooldown).

Name: Exiles I
Description: Your champions that start combat with no adjacent champions gain a 20% max Health shield for 10 seconds.

Name: Expedition
Description: At the start of every round, lose the champion in the rightmost bench slot. After losing 1 gold of champions in this way, gain a powerful reward. Gain a 3-cost champion now.

Name: Extra Buckles
Description: Gain a Giant's Belt. After your team takes 75000 damage, gain 2 more.

Name: Feeling Lucky
Description: Gain 12 gold, then flip a coin. If heads, gain 4 more gold.

Name: Find Your Center
Description: Your champion that starts combat in the center of the front row gains 15% Damage Amp and 25% max Health.

Name: Firesale
Description: Each round, steal a random 3-cost or lower champion from the shop. Gain 1 gold.

Name: Flowing Tears
Description: Gain a Tear of the Goddess. After your team spends 6500 Mana, gain 2 more.

Name: Focused Fire
Description: Your team gains 10% Attack Damage. Every 5 seconds, they gain 5% more.

Name: Forge a Friend
Description: The next 1-cost champion you buy is 3-star. Gain 2 gold.

Name: Glass Cannon I
Description: Allies that start combat in the back row begin combat at 80% Health but gain 16% Damage Amp.

Name: Good For Something I
Description: Champions that aren't holding items have a 40% chance to drop 1 gold on death.

Name: Group Hug I
Description: Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies 7 Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.

Name: Healing Orbs I
Description: When an enemy dies, the nearest ally is healed for 220.

Name: Iron Assets
Description: Gain a component anvil and 3 gold.

Name: Item Grab Bag
Description: Gain 1 random completed item.

Name: Kick Start
Description: Gain a random 2-star 2-cost champion and 1 gold.

Name: Late Game Specialist
Description: When you reach Level 9, gain 36 gold.

Name: Latent Forge
Description: After 8 player combats, gain an Artifact anvil.

Name: Lineup
Description: Your team gains 2 Armor and Magic Resist for each ally that starts combat in the front two rows.

Name: Lunch Money
Description: Every 8 damage you deal to enemy tacticians gives you 2 gold.

Name: Makeshift Armor I
Description: Allies without items equipped gain 30 Armor and Magic Resist.

Name: Missed Connections
Description: Gain a copy of each 1-cost champion.

Name: On a Roll
Description: Whenever you star up a champion that you fielded last combat, gain 2 free Shop rerolls. Gain 2 gold.

Name: One, Two, Five!
Description: Gain 1 random component, 2 gold, and 1 random 5-cost champion.

Name: One Two Three
Description: Gain 1 1-cost champion, 1 2-cost champion, and 1 3-cost champion.

Name: Pandora's Items
Description: Round start: items on your bench are randomized. Gain 1 random component.

Name: Partial Ascension
Description: After 12 seconds of combat, your team gains 20% Damage Amp.

Name: Patience is a Virtue
Description: Each round, gain 2 free rerolls if you did not buy a champion last round.

Name: Recombobulator
Description: Champions on your board permanently transform into random champions 1 cost tier higher (max 5). Gain 2 Magnetic Removers.

Name: Restart Mission
Description: Remove all champions on your board and bench. Gain 2 random 2-star 3-costs, 3 2-star 2-costs, and 1 2-star 1-cost champion.

Name: Risky Moves
Description: Your Tactician loses 20 Health, but after 7 player combats, gain 30 gold.

Name: Rolling For Days I
Description: Gain 10 free Shop rerolls.

Name: Second Wind
Description: After 10 seconds of combat, your team heals 40% of their missing Health.

Name: Silver Spoon
Description: Gain 10 XP.

Name: Size Matters
Description: Gain a Giant's Belt. After a champion starts combat with more than max Health, gain a Warmog's Armor.

Name: Slice of Life
Description: Twice per stage, gain a random champion. Its cost increases by Stage. This effect ends after receiving 1 5-cost champion.

Name: Slightly Magic Roll
Description: Roll a die. Gain rewards based on the number rolled.

Name: Small Grab Bag
Description: Gain 2 random item components.

Name: Stand United
Description: Gain 1.5% Attack Damage and 1.5% Ability Power for each non-unique Trait active across your team.

Name: Stellar Combo
Description: Gain an Aatrox. Your strongest Aatrox becomes an Attack Fighter with an ability that swaps between three different strikes.

Name: Survivor
Description: Gain 4 gold. After 3 players are eliminated, gain 100 more gold.

Name: Team Building
Description: Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator. Gain another after 5 player combats.

Name: Teaming Up
Description: Gain 1 random component and 2 random 3-cost champions.

Name: Termeepnal Velocity
Description: Gain a Poppy. Your strongest Poppy becomes a ranged Attack Caster that flings a high-velocity Meep at her target.

Name: The Tower
Description: Gain 450/700/1250/1600 Health based on round. Also grants holder 15% Critical Strike Chance.

Name: Tiny Titans
Description: Increase your current and max player health by 30.

Name: Twin Guardians
Description: If you have exactly 2 allies in your first row, grant them 100 bonus Health, 45 Armor, and 45 Magic Resist.

Name: Vampiric Vitality I
Description: You heal for 12% of the damage you deal to enemy Tacticians. Your team gains 10% Omnivamp.

Name: Advanced Loan
Description: Gain 20 Gold. Your next augment is one tier lower.

Name: Advanced Loan+
Description: Gain 33 Gold. Your next augment is one tier lower.

Name: A Magic Roll
Description: Roll 3 dice. Gain rewards based on their total.

Name: Anima Commander
Description: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by 10.

Name: Apotheotic Forge
Description: Choose 1 of 4 Divine Artifacts.

Name: Arcane Viktor-y
Description: After 8 seconds of combat, stun the enemy team for 1.5 seconds. Repeat this after 18 seconds of combat. TFT Macao Open, 2024

Name: Ascension
Description: After 12 seconds of combat, your team gains 35% Damage Amp.

Name: Aura Farming
Description: Gain a 2-star 5-cost champion holding a recommended item. You cannot field it until Stage 4-3.

Name: Backline Blueprint
Description: Gain a 3-cost non-Tank champion and an Emblem that matches their last-listed trait.

Name: Best Friends II
Description: Allies isolated in pairs gain 15% Attack Speed and 22 Armor at the start of combat.

Name: Big Grab Bag
Description: Gain 3 random components, 2 gold, and 1 Reforger.

Name: Birthday Reunion
Description: Gain a random 2-star 2-cost champion. When you reach Level 7, gain a Thief's Gloves. When you reach Level 9, gain a random 2-star 5-cost champion. Inkborn Fables Tactician's Crown, 2024

Name: Blood Offering
Description: Gain a Bloodthirster. Combat start: Allies holding Bloodthirsters lose 20% Health but gain a 30% Health shield and 10% Attack Damage.

Name: Bodyguard Training
Description: Allies gain 10 Armor and Magic Resist, increased by 3 per player level. Gizmos & Gadgets Championship, 2022

Name: Booster Pack
Description: Gain 10 gold of random champions. (At least one 3-cost guaranteed!)

Name: Booster Pack+
Description: Gain 18 gold of random champions. (At least one 4-cost guaranteed!)

Name: Booster Pack++
Description: Gain 26 gold of random champions. (At least one 5-cost guaranteed!)

Name: Bronze For Life I
Description: Your team gains 2.5% Damage Amp for each Bronze-tier trait. Damage Amp Bonus:

Name: Calculated Loss
Description: After losing your combat, gain 2 gold and a free Shop reroll.

Name: Care Package
Description: Now and at the start of the next 2 Stages, receive a care package with loot and 3 gold.

Name: Charge Transfer II
Description: Your team gains 8% Damage Amp. 80% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

Name: Clear Mind
Description: If there are no champions on your bench at the end of player combat, gain 3 XP.

Name: Climb The Ladder II
Description: Each time an ally dies, allies that share at least one trait with them gain 5% Ability Power, 5% Attack Damage, 5 Armor, and 5 Magic Resist.

Name: Clockwork Accelerator
Description: Your team gains 10% Attack Speed every 3 seconds in combat.

Name: Cluttered Mind
Description: Gain 4 random 1-cost champions now. If your bench is full at the end of player combat, gain 3 XP.

Name: Cognitive Overload
Description: Gain 7 gold, 1 2-star 1-cost champion, 1 2-cost champion, 1 3-cost champions, 1 XP, and 2 Shop reroll.

Name: Contract Killer
Description: Gain a Pyke. Your strongest Pyke becomes an Attack Fighter, generates gold on team takedown, and gains a reset on-kill Ability.

Name: Cosmic Restart
Description: Reroll your shop 8 times. Gain a random component.

Name: Crash Test Dummies
Description: Gain 2 Training Dummies. Combat start: Your Training Dummies launch themselves towards a group of enemies and Stun them for 1 seconds.

Name: Cry Me A River
Description: Gain a Tear of the Goddess. Your team gains 1 Mana Regen. After 12 seconds in combat, increase this to 3.

Name: Cybernetic Implants
Description: Allies holding an item gain 100 Health and 20% Attack Damage. Gain a B.F. Sword.

Name: Cybernetic Uplink II
Description: Your champions holding an item gain 120 Health and restore 2 Mana per second.

Name: Duo Queue
Description: Gain 2 random 5-cost champions and 2 copies of a random component.

Name: Early Learnings
Description: Your team gains 8% Attack Damage & Ability Power. This increases by 1% after each player combat. 1-cost champions gain double. TFT Vegas Open, 2023

Name: Electrocharge II
Description: Every 4 attacks an ally takes, they deal 50-140 (based on current Stage) magic damage to nearby enemies (1 second cooldown).

Name: Epic Rolldown
Description: When you reach Level 8, gain 20 Shop rerolls. Runeterra Reforged Championship, 2023

Name: Epoch
Description: Now, and at the start of every stage, gain 4 XP and 2 free rerolls.

Name: Epoch+
Description: Now, and at the start of every stage, gain 8 XP and 2 free rerolls.

Name: Exclusive Customization
Description: Gain a Lucky Item Chest, a Magnetic Remover, and 10 gold.

Name: Exiles II
Description: Your champions that start combat with no adjacent champions gain a 30% max Health shield for 10 seconds.

Name: Explosive Growth
Description: Now and at the start of the next 3 rounds, gain 7 XP.

Name: Explosive Growth+
Description: Now and at the start of the next 3 rounds, gain 10 XP.

Name: Feed the Flames
Description: Gain a Sunfire Cape. Your team gains 12% Omnivamp when attacking Burning enemies.

Name: Forward Thinking
Description: Lose all your gold. After 1 player combats, gain back the original amount and another 70 gold.

Name: Frontline Foundation
Description: Gain a 2-star 1-cost Tank champion and an Emblem that matches their last-listed trait.

Name: Gain 21 Gold
Description: Gain 21 gold.

Name: Gilded Steel
Description: Gain 2 non-Tank 5-cost champions. If you field at least one 5-cost champion, your 1 to 4-cost champions gain 8% Durability. K.O. Coliseum Tactician's Crown, 2025

Name: Glass Cannon II
Description: Allies that start combat in the back row begin combat at 80% Health but gain 25% Damage Amp.

Name: Group Hug II
Description: Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies 10 Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.

Name: Healing Orbs II
Description: When an enemy dies, the nearest ally is healed for 500.

Name: Heart of Steel
Description: Gain a Steadfast Heart. Every 10 seconds of combat its holder survives, Steadfast Heart gains additional permanent max Health.

Name: Heavy Is the Crown
Description: Gain a Crown of Demacia, which provides significant bonuses to the wearer. If the holder dies, lose the round.

Name: Heroic Grab Bag
Description: Gain 2 Lesser Champion Duplicators and 5 gold.

Name: Heroic Grab Bag+
Description: Gain 2 Lesser Champion Duplicators and 8 gold.

Name: Heroic Grab Bag++
Description: Gain 2 Lesser Champion Duplicators and 14 gold.

Name: High Voltage
Description: Gain an Ionic Spark. Your Ionic Sparks have +3 hex radius and do 20% more damage.

Name: Hustler
Description: You no longer gain interest but gain 3 gold at the start of every player combat round. Gain 3 gold now.

Name: Indiscriminate Killer
Description: Gain a Giant Slayer. Giant Slayers gain their Damage Amp against all enemies instead of just Tanks.

Name: Infinity Protection
Description: Gain 3 gold now. On Stage 3-7, gain an Infinity Force. Infinity Force gives allies in the same row a 12% Health shield. Monsters Attack Championship, 2023

Name: Invader Zed
Description: Gain a Spear of Shojin. On Stage 4-2, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops. Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.

Name: Jeweled Lotus I
Description: Your team gains 20% Critical Strike Chance and Precision.

Name: Kahunahuna
Description: Every 5th attack deals bonus true damage equal to 150% Basic Attack Damage.

Name: Know Your Enemy
Description: You can see who you will fight next. Your team gains 8% Damage Amp, increased to 15% if you and your opponent have any of the same traits active.

Name: Last Second Save
Description: The first time each ally falls below 35% Health, they restore 20% maximum Health.

Name: Late Game Scaling
Description: Gain 2 XP at the start of player combat rounds. Your 5-cost champions gain 12% Health and 12% Attack Speed. Cyber City Tactician's Crown, 2025

Name: Legion of Threes
Description: Gain a random Emblem. Your 3-cost champions and all allies equipped with an Emblem gain 150 Health and 12% Attack Speed. Reckoning Championship, 2021

Name: Little Buddies
Description: Your 4-cost and 5-cost champions gain 55 Health and 6% Attack Speed for every 1-cost and 2-cost champion on your board.

Name: Mace's Will
Description: Holder gains 25% Critical Strike Chance. Attacks deal bonus true damage.

Name: Makeshift Armor II
Description: Allies without items equipped gain 50 Armor and Magic Resist.

Name: Malicious Monetization
Description: Gain 4 gold. For the next 2 rounds, enemy champions drop 2 gold when killed.

Name: May the Fours Be With You
Description: Gain 144 Health and a 2-cost champion.

Name: Misfits
Description: Your team gains 55 Health for each active Unique trait. Gain a Rhaast and a Miss Fortune.

Name: Money Hungry
Description: Gain 7 gold now, then 7 gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.

Name: NO SCOUT NO PIVOT
Description: Champions that fight in player combat cannot be benched or sold. Your team gains 1% Health, and 1.5% Attack Damage and Ability Power after player combat.

Name: Pandora's Bench
Description: At the start of every round, champions on the 3 rightmost bench slots transform into random champions of the same cost. Gain 6 gold.

Name: Pandora's Items II
Description: Round start: items on your bench are randomized. Gain 2 random components.

Name: Patient Study
Description: After player combat, gain 2 XP if you won or 3 XP if you lost.

Name: Pilfer
Description: Each round, gain a 1-star copy of the first champion you killed last combat. The first time you gain 21 gold worth of champions in this way, gain a Thief's Gloves.

Name: Plot Armor
Description: Your team gains 8 Armor and Magic Resist. After falling below 50% Health, increase this to 40 for the rest of combat.

Name: Portable Forge
Description: Choose 1 of 4 Artifacts.

Name: Prizefighter
Description: Gain 2 item components. Every 5 wins gives you an item component.

Name: Pyromaniac
Description: Gain a Red Buff. Your Burns deal 50% increased damage.

Name: Reach for the Stars
Description: Gain a Jax. Your strongest Jax becomes a Magic Fighter that deal bonus magic damage on attack and gains stacking Attack Speed on cast.

Name: ReinFOURcement
Description: The next 4-cost champion you buy with gold is instantly upgraded to 2-star. Gain 5 gold.

Name: Replication
Description: Choose 1 of 3 components. For the next 2 rounds, gain a copy of that component.

Name: Salvage Bin
Description: Gain 1 random completed item now, and 1 component after 8 player combats. Selling champions breaks completed items into components (excluding Tactician's items and Emblems).

Name: Salvage Bin+
Description: Gain 1 random completed item now, and 1 component after 4 player combats. Selling champions breaks completed items into components (excluding Tactician's items and Emblems).

Name: Savings Account
Description: After you earn 50 gold in interest, gain 30 gold. Your max interest is increased to 7. Gain 4 gold now.

Name: Second Wind II
Description: After 10 seconds of combat, your team heals 60% of their missing Health.

Name: Seraphim's Staff
Description: Gain an Archangel's Staff. Archangel's Staff grants 2 additional Mana Regen if its holder has 90% or more Ability Power.

Name: Side Effects
Description: When an ally is healed, they deal 50% of the healing to their target as magic damage. Every 5 seconds, allies heal for 4% of their max Health.

Name: Slammin'
Description: Gain 3 gold. After each player combat, if there are no items on your bench (other than consumables), gain 2 XP.

Name: Slammin'+
Description: Gain 8 gold and 10 XP now. After each player combat, if there are no items on your bench (other than consumables), gain 2 XP.

Name: Solo Leveling
Description: For the next 5 combats, your team size is 1 but the champion you field has massively increased stats. Gain 1 XP for every kill they get. Afterwards, gain 2 item components.

Name: Solo Plate
Description: Gain a Gargoyle Stoneplate. Combat start: Allies holding Gargoyle Stoneplate gain 20% max Health if they're the only one in their row.

Name: Speedy Double Kill
Description: Gain a Guinsoo's Rageblade. When 2 players are eliminated, gain 40 gold. Fates Championship, 2021

Name: Spirit of Redemption
Description: Gain a Spirit Visage. Every 5 seconds, Spirit Visage heals allies within 1 hex for 7.5% of their missing Health.

Name: Spreading Roots
Description: Gain 2 random Emblems and 1 gold.

Name: Spreading Roots+
Description: Gain 2 random Emblems, a Reforger, and 2 gold.

Name: Staffsmith
Description: Gain 2 random completed items that build from Needlessly Large Rod.

Name: Sunfire Board
Description: Combat Start: Burn all enemies for 15% of their max Health over 15 seconds and reduce healing received by 33%.

Name: Swordsmith
Description: Gain 2 random completed items that build from B.F. Sword.

Name: The Big Bang
Description: Gain a Meepsie. Your strongest Meepsie becomes a Magic Fighter that leaps to a nearby hex to deal damage in a large radius.

Name: Tons of Stats!
Description: Your team gains 44 Health, 4% Attack Damage, 4% Ability Power, 4 Armor, 4 Magic Resist, 4% Attack Speed, and 4 Mana.

Name: Trade Sector
Description: Gain a free Shop reroll every round. Gain 2 gold.

Name: Treasure Hunt
Description: Gain a locked chest each Stage between now and Stage. Unlock each chest when you spend gold on Shop rerolls. These chests persist until opened.

Name: Trifecta I
Description: Gain 2 3-cost champions. Combat Start: 3 random 3-cost champions gain 220 Health and 20% Attack Speed.

Name: Two Much Value
Description: Gain 1 reroll for every 2 unique 2-cost champions fielded last player combat. Gain 1 2-cost champions.

Name: Two Tanky
Description: When you field exactly 2 copies of a champion, they both gain 600 Health. When one copy dies, the other gains a 40% max Health Shield for 12 seconds. When you 3-star, gain a 2-star copy.

Name: U.R.F
Description: Gain a Spatula. Champions holding Spatula or Frying Pan items gain 15% Attack Speed and 2 Mana Regen.

Name: Urf's Gambit
Description: If you win your next player combat, gain a Spatula. If you lose, gain a Frying Pan. Gain a component anvil and 6 gold now.

Name: Warlord's Honor
Description: Every round, your team gain 5% Attack Damage and Ability Power. Champions start with 1 stack of this effect, and can stack up to 4 times.

Name: Warpath
Description: Gain a 2-star 2-cost champion. After dealing 80 player damage, gain a chest of high cost champions and items.

Name: Worth the Wait
Description: Gain a random 1-cost champion. Gain another copy of them at the start of each round for the rest of the game.

Name: Woven Magic
Description: Gain a random item component. Every 2200 Mana your team spends grants an additional component (max /3).

Name: You Have My Bow
Description: Gain a Recurve Bow. Your team gains 12% Attack Speed.

Name: An Exalted Adventure
Description: Gain three 2-cost champions. If you 3-star two of them, gain an orb filled with loot. Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator at the start of next 2 stages.

Name: At What Cost
Description: Immediately go to level 6 and gain 12 XP. You don't get to choose your future augments.

Name: Band of Thieves II
Description: Gain 2 Thief's Gloves. After 8 player combats, gain another.

Name: Band of Thieves II+
Description: Gain 2 Thief's Gloves. After 6 player combats, gain another.

Name: Band of Thieves II++
Description: Gain 2 Thief's Gloves. After 3 player combats, gain another.

Name: Baron's Lair
Description: Gain a random Tank item. After 8 seconds of combat, your team gains 5% bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power every second for the rest of combat. TFT Paris Open, 2025

Name: Belt Overflow
Description: Gain 4 Giant's Belts. Your Giant's Belts grant +85 bonus Health.

Name: Birthday Present
Description: Gain a 2-star champion and 1 gold every time you level up. The champion's cost tier is your level minus 4 (max: 5-cost).

Name: Bronze For Life II
Description: Your team gains 2.5% Damage Amp and 4 Armor and Magic Resist for each Bronze-tier trait.

Name: Build a Bud
Description: Gain a random 3-star 1-cost champion. Gain 8 gold.

Name: Buried Treasures
Description: Earn interest on gold for 4 rounds.

Name: Call to Chaos
Description: Gain a powerful and random reward.

Name: Celestial Blessing III
Description: Your team gains 25% Omnivamp. Excess healing is converted to a shield up to 1000 Health.

Name: Comeback Story
Description: Your team gains 5 Health and 0.4% Attack Speed per missing player Health.

Name: Commerce Core
Description: Gain 16 free Shop rerolls now and 3 every round for the rest of the game.

Name: Component Heist
Description: After 6 player combats, gain 1 of every item component. Gain a random component now.

Name: Construct a Companion
Description: The next 1-cost champion you buy is 3-star. Gain 2 gold.

Name: Cursed Crown
Description: Gain +2 max team size and your team gains 4% Durability, but you take double player damage when you lose a player combat.

Name: Deadlier Blades
Description: Gain a Deathblade. Deathblades permanently gain 1% Attack Damage whenever their holders score a takedown.

Name: Deadlier Caps
Description: Gain a Rabadon's Deathcap. Rabadon's Deathcaps permanently gain Ability Power whenever their holders score a takedown.

Name: Exclusive Customization II
Description: Gain 7 gold. Get a random component.

Name: Expected Unexpectedness
Description: Now and at the start of the next 2 stages, roll 3 dice. Gain various rewards based on their total.

Name: Five-Pointed Star
Description: Now and at the start of each stage, the first champion you buy with a cost equal to the stage number is 2-star. Gain 2 gold and a 2-star 1-cost champion now.

Name: Flexible
Description: HP Per Emblem: 30.

Name: Forged in Strength
Description: Gain 1 random Artifact. When you drop below 40 Health, gain 3 more random Artifacts. Remix Rumble Championship, 2023

Name: Giant and Mighty
Description: Your team becomes large, gaining 200 Health and 10% max Health.

Name: Going Long
Description: You no longer gain interest. Gain 13 gold now. Round start: gain 4 XP.

Name: Golden Gamble
Description: Gain 1 gold and flip a coin. If heads, gain a Radiant Lucky Item Chest. If tails, gain Completed item anvils.

Name: Golden Gamble+
Description: Gain 2 gold. Gain a random component after each combat.

Name: Golden Gamble++
Description: Gain 6 gold. Gain a random component after each combat.

Name: Hard Commit
Description: Gain a random Emblem. Now and at the start of each Stage, gain a 1-star champion of that trait with a cost equal to the Stage (max 5) and 4 gold.

Name: Hedge Fund
Description: Gain 25 gold. Your max interest is increased to 10.

Name: Hedge Fund+
Description: Gain 30 gold. Your max interest is increased to 10.

Name: Hold the Line
Description: Allies in your back 2 rows gain 10% Ability Power and 9% Attack Damage for each ally that starts combat in your front row.

Name: Invested+
Description: Gain 26 gold. After every combat, gain 1 Shop reroll for every 10 gold above 50 (max 80 gold).

Name: Jeweled Lotus II
Description: Gain Precision. Precision: Ability damage can critically strike. Critical Strike Chance: 10%.

Name: Just Hit
Description: Gain a Champion Duplicator, 18 Shop rerolls, and 3 gold.

Name: Level Up!
Description: When you buy XP, gain an additional 2. Gain 10 immediately.

Name: Living Forge
Description: Gain an Artifact anvil now and after every 8 player combats.

Name: Lucky Gloves
Description: Thief's Gloves will always give your champions ideal items. Gain 2 Sparring Gloves.

Name: Lucky Gloves+
Description: Thief's Gloves will always give your champions recommended items. Gain 2 Sparring Gloves now, then another after 4 player combats.

Name: Luxury Subscription
Description: Gain a package containing a 5-cost champion, a 2-star 1-cost champion, and 5 gold. At the start of the next 2 stages, gain the package again.

Name: Min-Max
Description: Gain a Golden Item Remover and 4 random components.

Name: Money Monsoon
Description: Gain 7 gold now and every round for the rest of the game.

Name: New Recruit
Description: Gain +1 max team size and a Champion Duplicator.

Name: Nine Lives
Description: Set your current and max player Health to 9. On combat loss, you only lose 1 health and gain loot. You can't gain health.

Name: One Buff, Two Buff
Description: Gain a Red Buff, a Blue Buff, and a Champion Duplicator.

Name: Pandora's Items III
Description: Round start: items on your bench are randomized. Gain 1 random Radiant item.

Name: Prismatic Ticket
Description: Each time your Shop is rerolled, you have a 50% chance to gain a free reroll.

Name: Radiant Rascal
Description: Gain a Rascal's Gloves item. This equips 2 random Radiant items every round.

Name: Retribution
Description: Gain 2 Hands of Justice. Allies equipped with Hand of Justice gain Precision.

Name: Shimmerscale Essence
Description: Gain a Mogul's Mail. In 6 rounds, gain a Gamblers Blade.

Name: Shopping Spree
Description: When you level up, gain a number of free shop refreshes equal to your level+1. Gain 2 gold.

Name: Soul Awakening
Description: Combat start: Your team gains 1.5% Attack Damage and Ability Power per second for 10 seconds. At max stacks, deal 12% bonus true damage.

Name: Spoils of War III
Description: Enemies have a 40% chance to drop loot when killed.

Name: Subscription Service
Description: Now and at the start of each Stage, open a Shop of 4 unique 4-cost champions and gain 6 gold.

Name: Sweet Treats
Description: Gain an Artifact anvil. Your team gains 20 Health for each item equipped on champions. Health Gained: Magic N' Mayhem Tactician's Crown, 2024

Name: Sword Overflow
Description: Gain 4 B.F. Swords. Your B.F. Swords grant +4% Attack Speed.

Name: Tactician's Kitchen
Description: Gain a random Emblem. After 3 rounds, gain a Tactician's Cape.

Name: The Golden Egg
Description: Gain a golden egg that hatches in 11 turns for a huge amount of loot. Winning player combat speeds up the hatch timer by an extra turn.

Name: The Trait Tree
Description: Gain 3 random Emblems, a Reforger, and 2 gold.

Name: The Trait Tree+
Description: Gain 3 random Emblems, a Reforger, and 4 gold.

Name: Tiniest Titan
Description: Gain 2 player Health and 1 gold after every player combat. Your Tactician also moves faster.

Name: Tiny, but Deadly
Description: Your team becomes small, gaining 30% Attack Speed and Movement Speed.

Name: Trifecta II
Description: Gain 3 tier-3 champions. Allies gain 5% Attack Speed. Combat Start: 3 random tier-3 champions gain 300 Health and 25% Attack Speed.

Name: Upward Mobility
Description: Buying XP costs 1 less. Gain 2 Health and 2 free rerolls whenever you level up.

Name: Urf's Grab Bag
Description: Gain 1 Spatula, 3 random components, and 5 gold.

Name: Wand Overflow
Description: Gain 4 Needlessly Large Rods. Your Needlessly Large Rods grant +5% Attack Speed.

Name: We Stick Together
Description: Gain a random Emblem and a completed item anvil. Allies that share a trait with that Emblem gain 30% Attack Speed. Into The Arcane Tactician's Crown, 2025

Name: Win Out
Description: When you reach level 9, immediately level to 10 and gain 8 free Shop rerolls. Gain 6 XP now.

Name: Wise Spending
Description: You can no longer buy XP. Every time you spend gold to reroll your Shop, gain 2 XP. Gain 3 gold now.

Name: Worth the Wait II
Description: Gain 2 copies of a random 2-cost champion. Gain another copy of them at the start of each round for the rest of the game.

Name: Shieldmaiden
Description: Gain a Leona. Your strongest Leona becomes an Attack Fighter that dashes through enemies to deal physical damage, stunning the first target hit.

Name: Invested++
Description: Gain 40 gold. After every combat, gain 1 Shop reroll for every 10 gold above 50 (max 80 gold).

Name: Concentration
Description: Conduit Abilities last 25% to 50% longer, depending on the Ability. Gain Zoe and Mordekaiser.

Name: Heart of the Swarm
Description: All 3-star champions count toward Swarmling power. At level 9 with 6 unique 3-star champions, Primordians summon Apex Primordian. Gain Briar, Bel'veth, and 2-star Rek'sai.

Name: Loot Singularity
Description: Dark Star Black Holes consume enemies turning them into space matter for loot. Gain Cho'gath and Lissandra. Space matter and loot quality increases per Dark Star breakpoint.

Name: Tour of the Galaxy
Description: Voyagers gain 130 Health, 13% AD, and 13% AP, increased by 10% per new player fought. Prefer fighting players not recently faced. Gain Pyke and Meepsie.

Name: Timestream
Description: Timebreakers gain 2 Health and 0.25% Attack Speed per reroll. Gain Ezreal and Pantheon.
